ExportQuery:
WITH
CommDiags AS (
SELECT DISTINCT
dd.CommercialHCCNumber,dd.CommercialHCCDescription,dd.CommercialHCCVersion,dd.CommercialHCCType,dd.IsChronic HCCIsChronic
,cc.AgeDOSMin,cc.AgeDOSMax,cc.AgeDOSDescription,cc.AgeLastMin,cc.AgeLastMax,cc.AgeLastDescription
,aa.ICD,aa.DisplayDescription,aa.IsChronic ICDIsChronic,ee.EffectiveYear,cc.EffectiveStartDate as XRefStartDate,cc.EffectiveEndDate as XRefEndDate
FROM ICDDataset aa
INNER JOIN ICDEffectiveYear bb
    ON aa.ICDEffectiveYearID = bb.ICDEffectiveYearID
LEFT JOIN CommercialHCCICDDatasetXref cc
   ON aa.ICDDatasetID = cc.ICDDatasetID
LEFT JOIN CommercialHCCDataset dd
    ON cc.CommercialHCCDatasetID = dd.CommercialHCCDatasetID
LEFT JOIN HCCEffectiveYear ee
    ON dd.HCCEffectiveYearID = ee.HCCEffectiveYearID
WHERE ee.EffectiveYear > 2019
GROUP BY dd.CommercialHCCNumber,dd.CommercialHCCDescription,dd.CommercialHCCVersion,dd.CommercialHCCType,dd.IsChronic
,cc.AgeDOSMin,cc.AgeDOSMax,cc.AgeDOSDescription,cc.AgeLastMin,cc.AgeLastMax,cc.AgeLastDescription
,aa.ICD,aa.DisplayDescription,aa.IsChronic,ee.EffectiveYear,cc.EffectiveStartDate,cc.EffectiveEndDate
)
,Result AS (
SELECT DISTINCT
MemberId
,MedicareBeneficiaryID 
,MedicaidID 
,PlanID 
,LastName 
,FirstName 
,MiddleInitial
,DateOfBirth
,Gender
,GapYear
,SourceName,batchid
,GapType
,SuspectedHCC
,HCCType
,HCCVersion
,EvidenceCodeValue
,EvidenceCodeType
,EvidenceCodeDescription
,EvidenceDateOfService
,CAST(EvidenceCodeResult AS DECIMAL(10,4)) EvidenceCodeResult
,EvidenceIdentifier
,CAST(ProbabilityScore AS DECIMAL(10,4)) ProbabilityScore
FROM QueryResult qr
JOIN CommDiags cd on cd.CommercialHCCNumber=qr.SuspectedHCC AND cd.ICD=qr.EvidenceCodeValue AND cd.CommercialHCCTYpe=qr.hcctype  AND cd.CommercialHCCVersion=qr.hccversion AND cd.EffectiveYear=qr.GapYear
WHERE qr.GapType='Historical' AND qr.EvidenceCodeType='ICD' AND FileLayoutDescription = 'ACAMemberConditionGap'
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT
MemberId
,MedicareBeneficiaryID 
,MedicaidID 
,PlanID 
,LastName 
,FirstName 
,MiddleInitial
,DateOfBirth
,Gender
,GapYear
,SourceName,batchid
,GapType
,SuspectedHCC
,HCCType
,HCCVersion
,EvidenceCodeValue
,EvidenceCodeType
,EvidenceCodeDescription
,EvidenceDateOfService
,CAST(EvidenceCodeResult AS DECIMAL(10,4)) EvidenceCodeResult
,EvidenceIdentifier
,CAST(ProbabilityScore AS DECIMAL(10,4)) ProbabilityScore
FROM QueryResult
WHERE FileLayoutDescription = 'ACAMemberConditionGap' AND (GapType<>'Historical'  or (GapType='Historical' AND EvidenceCodeType<>'ICD'))
)
,THIS AS(
SELECT
   MemberId
  ,MedicareBeneficiaryID 
  ,MedicaidID 
  ,PlanID 
  ,LastName 
  ,FirstName 
  ,MiddleInitial
  ,DateOfBirth
  ,Gender
  ,GapYear
  ,SourceName
  ,collect_set( --removes any dups found
           named_struct(
            'GapType', GapType
           ,'SuspectedHCC', SuspectedHCC
           ,'HCCType', HCCType
           ,'HCCVersion', HCCVersion
           ,'EvidenceCodeValue', EvidenceCodeValue
           ,'EvidenceCodeType', EvidenceCodeType
           ,'EvidenceCodeDescription', EvidenceCodeDescription
           ,'EvidenceDateOfService', EvidenceDateOfService
           ,'EvidenceCodeResult', CAST(EvidenceCodeResult AS DECIMAL(10,4))
           ,'EvidenceIdentifier', EvidenceIdentifier
           ,'ProbabilityScore', CAST(ProbabilityScore AS DECIMAL(10,4))
           ) 
   ) as memberGap
FROM Result
GROUP BY
   MemberId
  ,MedicareBeneficiaryID 
  ,MedicaidID 
  ,PlanID 
  ,LastName 
  ,FirstName 
  ,MiddleInitial
  ,DateOfBirth
  ,Gender
  ,GapYear
  ,SourceName
)
SELECT *
FROM THIS
